(Railway Board) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 4th February, 1999 G.S.R. 47.~~In exercise of the powers con- ferred by sub-section (1) and clause ,(g) of sub- section (2) of section 60 read with section 198 and clause (a) of sub-section (2) of section 200 of the Railways Act, 1989 (24 of m9), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Indian Railways (Open Lines) General Rules, 1976, namely:— 1. (1) These rules may be called the Indians Railways (Open Lines) General (Amendment) Rules, 1999. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Indian Railways (Open Lines; General Rules, 1976, in Chapter TV in rule 4.08, in sub- rule (1) after clause (b), the following clause shall be inserted, namely :— "(c) The Driver shall observe the sanctioned sectional spesd except when either on& speedometer in cas& of electric loco or two speedometers in case of other loco- motives are defective. In such cases of defective speedometers both the maxi- mum permissible speed and booked speed of coaching trains shall be reduced by tea per cent ft'om the speed otherwise permissible." [No. 97fSafety(A&R) |29[27] SHANTINARASN, Member Traffic and Ex-Qffido Secy. NOTE:—The principal rales were notified vid© No. GSR 445(E) dated the 21st My, 1981 and subsequently amended vide No. (1) GSR 320 dated the 16th April, 1983. (2) GSR 352 dated the 30th April, 1983, (3) GSR 514(E) dated the 27th June, 1983, (4) GSR 476(E) dated 28fh June, 1984, (5) GSR 245 dated the 23rd May, 1992, (6) GSR 83 dated the 17th February, 1996, and (7) GSR 101 dated the 23rd May, 199%. -- 1 of 1 --
